forecasts.detailed: Rain. Cloudy. High near 47, with temperatures falling to around 40 in the afternoon. Northwest wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

Rain showers and patchy fog. Cloudy. High near 52, with temperatures falling to around 41 in the afternoon. Northwest wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

Rain and snow showers likely before 3pm, then rain and snow showers likely. Mostly cloudy. High near 46, with temperatures falling to around 37 in the afternoon. Northwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

Rain and areas of fog. Cloudy, with a high near 46. Northwest wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

Rain showers before 5pm. Cloudy, with a high near 48. Northwest wind 10 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
A chance of rain showers. Partly sunny, with a high near 50. Northwest wind around 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
